sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 operand unpacker. Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, implicit significand, effective exponent, and zero/infinity/NaN flags.
sub_modules.fp_mult_special: Combinational special-case resolver. Implements NaN, zero-times-infinity invalid operation, signed infinity, and signed zero priority handling.
sub_modules.fp_mult_mul_exp: Combinational significand multiplier and biased exponent adder. Produces the 48-bit mantissa product and pre-normalized result exponent.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalizer. Handles right normalization for products >=2 and left normalization for subnormal-input products while generating guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Combinational round-to-nearest-even unit. Rounds the 24-bit significand using guard/round/sticky bits and adjusts exponent on rounding carry.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Combinational IEEE-754 result packer. Applies forwarded special results, overflow to signed infinity, normal packing, and underflow flush-to-zero.
